response.step_by_step_log: Identified two musical segments. 1. 'LONELY ROLLING STAR' (Katamari Damacy) - searched for 'Lonely Rolling Star Japanese lyrics'. 2. 'チルノのパーフェクトさんすう教室' (Touhou Project/IOSYS) - searched for 'Cirno's Perfect Math Class lyrics Japanese and English'. Performers are virtual characters Biboo and Hajime. Used simple search strings as per instructions.
response.global_summary: A 2-song musical medley performed by VTubers Biboo and Todoroki Hajime, with an interlude. The first song is a Japanese cover of 'Lonely Rolling Star' from Katamari Damacy, and the second is 'Cirno's Perfect Math Class' from Touhou Project.

scenes.description: Biboo starts singing 'Lonely Rolling Star' while text appears in the top-left and top-right corners. Biboo is the main performer, joined by Hajime.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
陽だまり サンサン
心は晴れ模様
ふたつの瞳は
ひまわりの種のような
語らい重なり
塊絡まり
一緒にいること
絶対必然
でもあなた 大事な夢を描く
終わるまでは ずっとそう ここで待っている
Your lonely rolling star
立ち止まらないで ね
Your lonely rolling star
さあ 前を向いてゆこう
星空 キラキラ
金平糖のような
甘くて切ない
想いが募るの
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Laying in the brilliant sun
The weather in my heart looks clear
The pupils of those two eyes
Just like sunflower seeds
Lovers' chats pile up, overlapping
Akatamari, an entanglement
Being together
Is an absolute necessity
Except you are drawing out your important dream
Until you’re finished, I’ll be right here waiting for you
Your lonely rolling star
Don't you ever stop!
Your lonely rolling star
So, face forward and keep going!
A sky of stars, sparkling and glittering
Like dots of sugar candy...

scenes.description: The second segment begins with 'Cirno's Perfect Math Class' with on-screen text identifying the song and creators. Biboo and Hajime perform a dance battle.
scenes.song_title: チルノのパーフェクトさんすう教室
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
みんなー！
チルノのさんすう教室はじまるよー！
あたいみたいな天才になるし
がんばっていってね！
キラキラ ダイアモンド
輝く星のように
栄光 志望校
なんとかして入ろう
天才 秀才
トップ目指して
GO GO！！
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Everyone! Cirno's Math Class is starting!
To become a genius like me, do your best!
A sparkling diamond, like a shining star
Glory, my preferred school, I'll get in somehow
Genius, prodigy, aim for the top, GO GO!!
